Bloom Picker

Edit Sales Office AV Note

Publish Decision

Publish completed request in the app?

Choose Yes, Publish in App to make the completed photos and data visible through the normal Drive and AV master-row flow. Choose No, Email Only to keep the completed details only in the request email thread.

New Crop Release

Send this completed row for approval?

Choose Yes, Send Email to also email Dylan and JD as a New Crop Release. Choose No, Normal Request Only to keep the regular request save and rep completion email without sending the extra New Crop Release email.

Hold Row

Take off Hold?

Choose Yes to send this completed photo row to Dylan for Take Off Hold approval. Choose No to finish the row without creating the approval.

Rep Email

Send to reps?

Choose Yes, Select Reps to open the flexible OK, NC, TX, and Admin recipient selector. Choose No to leave the approval in Inventory Office without sending the extra rep email.
